detail.loadError: Could not load this booking. Please try again.

notFound.title: Booking not found
notFound.description: This booking may have been removed, or the link is no longer valid.

checkIn.explanation: Check in to let the branch know you've arrived. Staff will start washing your vehicle right after you check in.

complete.explanation: Only confirm once your vehicle is fully washed. Loyalty points are credited immediately and this cannot be undone, so double-check before confirming.
complete.error: Confirming completion failed. Please try again.
complete.successBanner: Booking completed! Loyalty points have been added to your account.

feedback.title: Rate your service
feedback.description: Tell us how this wash went.
feedback.commentPlaceholder: Share your thoughts about the service...
feedback.error: Submitting feedback failed. Please try again.
feedback.validation: Please choose at least 1 star before submitting.

readOnly.NO_SHOW: This booking was recorded as a no-show. Contact the branch if you believe this is a mistake.
readOnly.CHANGE_REQUESTED: Your reschedule request is being processed. The branch will reach out to confirm a new time.
